creator: bbtruk@users.sourceforge.net
text:
I have just tested the patch in RedPorts and it is building without
errors:
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20131205232137-93233/

I would say the problem lies in your environment.

Can you deinstall all lazarus ports, upgrade your ports tree, re-apply
the patch and try to build doublecmd port again?

(If you haven't modified any file under /usr/local/share/lazarus and
there are leftovers after deinstalling, delete that complete directory
too before trying to build again).
